title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? ECIL South Asia Partners in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
